text: Data visualization plays an increasingly important role in scientific publications. However, most of commercial software has limitation on the speed to learn the skills, the expensive price, and the limitation to use on different system platforms. To deal with the above problems, we have developed a new web-based web server, named as SRplot, that encompasses more than a hundred of the most frequently used data visualization and graphing components. SRplot supports all popular web browsers and requires a minimum amount of local CPU resource. This plot tool uses an interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI) that enables users to just copy and paste the data of interest in a well-structured text format, and then obtain in real time a customized graph that can be subsequently stored as publication-quality PNG, TIFF, PDF or SVG formats. The tool has been improved according to user’s feedback and is now being used in over 500 scientific publications (Up to April.15). The SRplot web server is available at the web page http://www.bioinformatics.com.cn/SRplot.
headline: Fully Human Written
